tags.label: Subliminal Liminals — Synthograsizer Template
tags.description: Psychedelic architectural liminal spaces overlaid with protest quotes, resistance slogans, and philosophical provocations as subliminal text. 8 architectural styles, 6 psychedelic modes, 197 weighted subliminal messages. Converted from EmProps weighted_pick variable format.
